cap_exceller.summary: Capgemini's campus assessment: scenario-based technical screening plus a structured behavioural round, weighted toward problem-solving depth and clear communication.
cap_exceller.source_note: Pattern synthesised from publicly discussed Capgemini Exceller prep experiences - treat exact weightings as indicative, not officially published.

tcs_nqt.summary: A timed aptitude-led test: verbal, numerical and reasoning sections followed by a short coding segment.
tcs_nqt.cutoff_note: approx. 65pct band commonly cited by aspirants - unverified, label as indicative only
tcs_nqt.source_note: Section layout aligned to widely-reported TCS NQT structure; cutoff is unverified and shown to learners with an uncertainty flag.

infytq.summary: Infosys's certification-style assessment covering programming fundamentals and an advanced track, MCQ and lab-based.
infytq.source_note: 65pct certification threshold is published in Infosys's official InfyTQ examination guidelines.

wipro_nlth.summary: Written English, aptitude and coding sections, with an emphasis on workplace-English clarity alongside technical screening.
wipro_nlth.cutoff_note: unverified - shown to learners with an uncertainty flag
wipro_nlth.source_note: Section composition aligned to widely-reported Wipro NLTH structure; cutoff is unverified.

accenture_asset.summary: Accenture's campus screen: a timed aptitude block (verbal, reasoning, pseudocode) followed by a technical and an HR round for those who clear it.
accenture_asset.cutoff_note: unverified - shown to learners with an uncertainty flag
accenture_asset.source_note: Section layout aligned to widely-reported Accenture ASSET structure; cutoff is unverified and shown with an uncertainty flag.

cognizant_genc.summary: Cognizant's entry-level hiring track: an aptitude and coding assessment, then an automata-style technical round and an HR conversation.
cognizant_genc.cutoff_note: unverified - shown to learners with an uncertainty flag
cognizant_genc.source_note: Section composition aligned to widely-reported Cognizant GenC structure; cutoff is unverified and shown with an uncertainty flag.
